# GSE299340 / GSM9037559
```{r}
sample_id = 3
main_path <- '/mnt/jack-5/amismailov/miRNA_study/breast/'
type <- 'breast'
```


# LOAD
```{r}
library(Seurat) 
#saveRDS(seu, file = paste0(main_path, 'rds/', sample_id, '.rds'))
seu <- readRDS(file = paste0(main_path, 'rds/', sample_id, '.rds'))
```
 

# stantard workflow
```{r}
library(DoubletFinder)
deduplex <- function(obj){
  nExp <- round(0.05 * ncol(obj))
  
  obj <- doubletFinder(obj, PCs = 1:10, pN = 0.25, pK = 0.09, 
                       nExp = nExp, reuse.pANN = NULL, sct = FALSE)
  
  df_cols <- grep("DF.classifications", colnames(obj@meta.data), value = TRUE)
  df_col <- df_cols[1]
  cat("Doublet column:", df_col, "\n")
  
  cat('Cells Before:', ncol(obj), '\n')
  
  # Фикс: Индексация по meta.data напрямую (без subset/FetchData)
  singlet_idx <- which(obj@meta.data[[df_col]] == "Singlet")
  obj <- obj[, singlet_idx]
  
  cat('Cells After:', ncol(obj), '\n')
  return(obj)
}
stantard_workflow <- function(seu, n_components=15, res=0.1){
  seu <- NormalizeData(seu)                             
  seu <- FindVariableFeatures(seu, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 2000)   
  seu <- ScaleData(seu, features = rownames(seu)) 
  seu <- RunPCA(seu, features = VariableFeatures(object = seu))
  seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:n_components)
  seu <- FindClusters(seu, resolution = res)
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:n_components)
  seu <- deduplex(seu)
  return(seu)
} # Norm, Scale, PCA, UMAP

change_n <- function(seu, res=0.1, n=10){
  seu <- FindNeighbors(seu, dims = 1:n)
  seu <- FindClusters(seu, res=res)
  seu <- RunUMAP(seu, dims = 1:n)
  return(seu)
}
```


# DATA LOAD
```{r}
library(Matrix)
library(Seurat)
library(data.table)

path <- paste0(main_path, sample_id)

# counts
counts <- readMM(file.path(path, "matrix.mtx.gz"))

# barcodes
barcodes <- fread(file.path(path, "barcodes.tsv.gz"), header = FALSE)[[1]]

# features
features <- fread(file.path(path, "features.tsv.gz"), header = FALSE)
colnames(features) <- c("feature_id", "feature_name", 'x')
features$x = NULL

features$feature_name <- make.unique(features$feature_name)
rownames(counts) <- features$feature_name
colnames(counts) <- barcodes

seu <- CreateSeuratObject(
  counts = counts,
  project = as.character(sample_id)
)
seu[["RNA"]]@meta.data$gene_id <- features$feature_id
seu[["RNA"]]@meta.data$gene_name <- features$feature_name # save HGNC: BEST practice
print(seu)
```


# QC
```{r}
# QC метрики
seu[["percent.mt"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^MT-")   
seu[["percent.ribo"]] <- PercentageFeatureSet(seu, pattern = "^RP[SL]")

p1 <- VlnPlot(seu, features='nFeature_RNA', layer='counts', pt.size=0)
p2 <- VlnPlot(seu, features='nCount_RNA', layer='counts', pt.size=0)
p3 <- VlnPlot(seu, features='percent.mt', layer='counts', pt.size=0)

p1
p2
p3

```

# Filtering + standard workflow
```{r} 
set.seed(123)
seu <- subset(seu, subset = percent.mt < 15 & nFeature_RNA > 300 & nFeature_RNA < 4e3 & nCount_RNA < 10e4) # ФИЛЬТРЫ!

seu <- stantard_workflow(seu, res=0.1, n_components = 5)

DimPlot(seu, reduction = 'umap', label = T)
```
# ЕСЛИ ХОЧЕШЬ ПОМЕНЯТЬ КОЛИЧЕСТВО КОМПОНЕНТ!
```{r}
seu <- change_n(seu, n=15)

DimPlot(seu, reduction = 'umap', label = T)
```

# Differentially expressed genes
```{r}

FAM <- FindAllMarkers(seu,
                      logfc.threshold = 0.25, 
                      min.pct = 0.1,
                      only.pos = TRUE,
                      test.use = 'wilcox',
                      layer = 'data')

FAM <- FAM[FAM$p_val_adj<0.05,]



clusters <- names(table(Idents(seu)))

top_genes <- list()
for (cl in clusters) {
  cluster_genes <- FAM$gene[FAM$cluster == cl][1:30]  
  top_genes[[as.character(cl)]] <- cluster_genes
}
top_genes
```


```{r}
FeaturePlot(seu, 'EGFR', order=T)
DimPlot(seu, label=T)
```

# COPYKAT
```{r}
library(copykat)

seu_subset <- subset(seu, idents=c('2', '0', '6')) # ВЫБИРАЕШЬ РАКОВЫЙ и ИММУННЫЙ КЛАСТЕР

immune_clusters <- c(2) # ВЫБИРАЕШЬ ИММУННЫЙ КЛАСТЕР

background <- colnames(seu_subset)[seu_subset$seurat_clusters %in% immune_clusters]

counts <- GetAssayData(seu_subset, layer = "counts", assay = "RNA")

copykat_res <- copykat(
  rawmat          = as.matrix(counts),
  id.type         = "S",
  ngene.chr       = 5,
  win.size        = 25, 
  norm.cell.names = background,
  distance        = "pearson",
  n.cores         = 8,
  KS.cut          = 0.1,           # Strict cutoff
  plot            = F,
  output.seg      = F
)
rm(counts)
gc()
```

```{r}
pred <- data.frame(copykat_res$prediction)
seu_subset$copykat_pred <- pred$copykat.pred[match(colnames(seu_subset), pred$cell.names)]

DimPlot(seu_subset, group.by = "copykat_pred")
DimPlot(seu_subset, label=T)
```
 
# Rename clusters 
```{r}
new_cluster_names <- c( 
  '0' = 'T cells', 
  '1' = 'TAMs', 
  '2' = 'Malignant cells',
  '4' = 'Fibroblasts',
  
  '3' = 'Remove'
)
seu <- RenameIdents(seu, new_cluster_names)  
seu$Annotation <- as.character(Idents(seu))

#seu <- subset(seu, idents='Remove', invert=T)
DimPlot(seu, reduction = 'umap', label = T)
```

# GO analysis
```{r}
#### Differentially expressed genes
FAM <- FindAllMarkers(seu,
                      logfc.threshold = 0.25, 
                      min.pct = 0.1,
                      only.pos = TRUE,
                      test.use = 'wilcox',
                      layer = 'data')

FAM <- FAM[FAM$p_val_adj<0.05,]


clusters <- names(table(Idents(seu)))
top_genes <- list()
for (cl in clusters) {
  cluster_genes <- FAM$gene[FAM$cluster == cl][1:200]  
  top_genes[[as.character(cl)]] <- cluster_genes
}
####################
```

```{r}
top_genes$`Malignant cells`
```




```{r}
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

res <- enrichGO(gene = top_genes$`Malignant cells`,
                    OrgDb = org.Hs.eg.db,
                    keyType = "SYMBOL",
                    ont = "BP",
                    pAdjustMethod = "BH",
                    qvalueCutoff = 0.05)
 
# визуализация
dotplot(res, showCategory=10) 
```
